## Summary

No functional implementation changes were introduced in this revision. The diff only updates run orchestration metadata (`.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-5/run.json`), so there are no new runtime correctness, safety, or robustness defects attributable to this patch.

None.
